payload.collection_methodology: Electronic health records from Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center, de-identified per HIPAA Safe Harbor
known_limitations: Single-center data may not generalize to all clinical settings
ICD-10 coding inconsistencies present in approximately 3% of records

quality_checks_performed.result: 4.1% missing values imputed using clinical rules

payload.representativeness_assessment: Dataset covers 524k patient admissions with broad demographic representation. Known underrepresentation of pediatric (<5%) and geriatric (>90 years, <2%) populations.
payload.source: PhysioNet / MIT Lab for Computational Physiology
